verified: No Google score or ranking probability
No invented expertise, originality, factual accuracy, experience, or user satisfaction
not_verified: Human usefulness across controlled benchmark content

verified: Support requires a supplied reviewer and review date
Missing sources and contradictions remain explicit
Source URL alone never verifies a claim
Canonical relevance and SERP brief gate reused
Information gain and source register required
Audience, intent, primary question, and sections required
Draft authorization remains distinct from publication
not_verified: Draft quality against controlled benchmark briefs

verified: Publication dates are not automatically modified
not_verified: Causal attribution using technical, SERP, competitor, seasonality, and conversion evidence

verified: Word, sentence, heading, citation, overlap, and term comparison
No copyright, originality, accuracy, usefulness, or ranking claim
not_verified: Human usefulness scoring against controlled criteria

verified: Detected numbers, URLs, and citations preserved
AI-detector evasion and authorship concealment explicitly unsupported
not_verified: Human editorial preference across benchmark audiences

verified: Legacy content commands delegated to their canonical implementation
Seven new commands registered to existing agents and skills

release_gate.required_for_full_parity: Controlled benchmark review and an authorized independent source-verification capability in a later phase
must_not_do: Do not present editorial diagnostics as a Google score or ranking probability
Do not treat a citation or source URL as proof of claim support
Do not turn heuristic entities into verified identities
Do not assign cause from period-over-period decline alone
Do not support AI-detector evasion or authorship concealment
Do not automatically change publication dates to simulate freshness
